title: select_with_fee: selected.len() as u64 violates no-as-cast rule
description: tx_builder.rs select_with_fee: let n = selected.len() as u64. Project style bans as-casts where truncation could silently corrupt values. On real targets usize==u64 so no actual truncation, but the pattern is wrong precedent. Fix: u64::try_from(selected.len()).expect("note count fits in u64").
